message:
chore: add .vercelignore exclusions, remove tracked build cache trash

Add exclusion patterns to .vercelignore:
- core.* / **/core.* — prevent Linux core dump uploads during deploy
- .next_trash_* / **/.next_trash_* — prevent stale Next.js trash dirs
  (build cache leftovers from .next directory replacement)
- .git/** — prevent git history upload, saving bandwidth

Remove apps/web/.next_trash_2/ — turbopack SST/meta files, image cache,
and build manifests that should never have been tracked. Already covered
by root .gitignore but slipped through.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
